message:
feat(serve): SSE event stream endpoint and attention webhook integration

Expand the HTTP serve layer with attention feed integration:

- Add /api/events SSE endpoint for streaming attention events to
  connected clients with cursor-based resumption
- Webhook delivery for attention events exceeding actionability threshold
- Event filtering by session, category, actionability, severity
- Connection lifecycle management with heartbeat keepalive
- Graceful shutdown drains active SSE connections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
